answer:
<think> I'm thinking of popular TV shows produced by Scott Gimple, and I recall that he was involved in the production of The Walking Dead. However, I'm not sure if that's the show I'm looking for. I also know that Scott Gimple has worked on other shows, but I'm not aware of any that feature a main character named Cornelius Fillmore. I'm going to try to think of other shows that Scott Gimple has worked on... Ah, I remember that he was also involved in the production of Fear the Walking Dead, but I don't think that's the show I'm looking for either. Wait, I have it! I think I know a show that might fit the description... I'm thinking of a show that is a spin-off of The Simpsons, and it's called... Family Guy isn't it, no... I think I have it! The show I'm thinking of is actually American Dad!, but that's not it either. I'm going to keep thinking... Ah, I've got it! The show I'm thinking of is actually a spin-off of The Simpsons, but it's not American Dad!... I'm going to try to think of other shows that are spin-offs of The Simpsons... Ah, I've got it! The show I'm thinking of is actually... Fillmore! That's right, Fillmore is a TV show that is a spin-off of The Simpsons, and it's centered on a character named Cornelius Fillmore. I'm pretty sure that's the show I was thinking of.</think>
<answer> Fillmore </answer>
